subject: quick question
body:
Have you seen Silvia?  She was so ready to go with us and we loved her (I
always have) and met with her twice.   I think her mother agent had other
ideas but she did not seem to care.  I know she had a booking in Africa then
was also repairing an implant.  Just wondering if you have heard from her or
if you have a foreign number on her etc...
 
I've asked Anetta to call Nadia several times for poloroids after she
colored her hair a bit and Anetta is out with Pneumonia so am wondering
where we are with that.  I will contact her.
 
Thanks,
 
Jeff Fuller
MC2 Model Management
6 West 14th Street
New York, NY  10011
P)646-638-3330
F)212-226-4060
C)646-339-4199
Jeff@mc2mm.com
WWW.MC2MM.com <http://www.mc2mm.com/>
